# CWE-551 positive: admin check on raw path before unescape (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-551-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

func AdminPathGate(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		raw := r.URL.Path
		if !strings.HasPrefix(raw, "/admin") {
			http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		clean := strings.ReplaceAll(raw, "%2f", "/")
		r.URL.Path = clean
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}
